TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tida'an ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 104 buwan, 245 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 65% kyan ku 159 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 35% kyan ku 86 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 59%, Kebalan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. tay 'llaw na Tida'an hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tida'an hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tida'an hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tida'an hya' ga llyung.
S.PHON: alaŋ ti*aʔan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu tojoħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, keβalan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. taj ʔllaw na ti*aʔan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ti*aʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ti*aʔan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ti*aʔan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ.
S.FORM: alang Tida'an ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 104 buwan, 245 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 65% kyan ku 159 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 35% kyan ku 86 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 59%, Kebalan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. tay 'llaw na Tida'an hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tida'an hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tida'an hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tida'an hya' ga llyung.
S.PHON: alaŋ ti*aʔan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu tojoħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, keβalan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. taj ʔllaw na ti*aʔan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ti*aʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ti*aʔan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ti*aʔan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ.
